## Summary

Describe the change in 2-5 lines.

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] Module catalog
- [ ] Factory/scaffolding
- [ ] Bridge/control plane
- [ ] UI/design system
- [ ] CI/maintenance

## Security impact

- [ ] No security-sensitive behavior changed
- [ ] Auth/authZ changed
- [ ] Bridge token/job behavior changed
- [ ] Supabase migration/RLS changed
- [ ] CORS, secrets or deployment behavior changed

Explain the impact:

## Tests run

- [ ] `npm ci`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm audit --audit-level=high`
- [ ] `npm run security:grep`
- [ ] `npm run factory:check`

## Data/privacy checklist

- [ ] No real customer name, domain, prompt, document or data was added.
- [ ] No secret, token, dump or private `.env` file was added.
- [ ] Demo data is anonymized and generic.

## Deployment notes

Mention migrations, DNS, environment variables, Bridge token rotation, or
operator action required.
